architecture: spec §3 two-head net: shared MLP encoder (Linear-LayerNorm-ReLU-Dropout blocks), head F sigmoid, head p sigmoid, R = 1-(1-p)^min(u,u*)
refit: all dev seasons 2019-2025, cosine LR over 200 epochs stopped at e_star, no ES (A9)
selection: mean val AP of F*R vs Y_obs; tie-break mean zero-311-stratum p@250 of F; then config_idx
loss: L = BCE(Y_obs, F*R) + lam*NLL_zero-trunc-binomial(k|u,p) + mu1*Omega1 + mu2*Omega2 (resolved axes A1-A8 in src/s3b_primary.py header)
